summary:
Fixed: Ref-typed getters now return a reference, not an owned value.

Change made in src/codegen.rs, generate_getter:

Before  
    pub fn {field}(&self) -> {Type} {  
        &self.{field}  
    }

After  
    pub fn {field}(&self) -> &{Type} {  
        &self.{field}  
    }

Running the test script:

$ /app/test.sh
=== Code Generation Engine Tests ===
--- Building ---
... (warnings) ...
--- Simple accessor test ---
PASS: simple accessor tests
--- Complex nested accessor test ---
PASS: complex nested accessor tests
--- Generated code inspection ---
PASS: All code generation tests passed

The code-generation engine now produces the correct accessor signatures and all tests succeed.
